column2: Crowne Plaza Hotel — Conference Ballroom Venue Hire (Includes 2 Coffee Breaks & Gala Dinner for all delegates)

SMD / LED Screen — Main Stage (P2.5 — 12ft x 10ft)
Registration Counter with Equipment & Branded Fascia
Printed Media Walls — Event Branding & Photo Backdrop
Table Branding, Name Plates & Delegate Collateral
Professional Sound System (Line Array + 8 Wireless Mics)
Content Design & Development (Digital Screens, Print & Social Media)
Simultaneous Translation System (English / Arabic / Urdu) — Equipment & Interpreters
1. All prices are in Saudi Riyals (SAR). PKR amounts calculated at 1 SAR = 78 PKR
2. Venue cost (Crowne Plaza) includes 2 coffee breaks and gala dinner for all delegates
3. Event Permit from SCEGA (if applicable) — not included in this quotation — to be arranged separately
4. Any additional requirements beyond this scope will be quoted separately
5. This quotation is valid for 30 days from the date of issue
6. Prices reflect 2026 rates — adjusted from previous engagements
